universal hook system reference, hook registry, lifecycle mapping, and validation template
subagent orchestrator skill, topology and role registry, task/result contracts, run ledger, isolation rules, lifecycle controls, and Subagent Eval Lab
agent-creator skill
production skill OS reference
universal references for skill training, package boundary, birth, IDE/runtime adaptation, adapters, context gates, evidence, long-running tools, isolation, observability, and validation
IR, tool registry, manifest, trigger lab, output eval, stage gate, target conformance, final evidence, independent review, and release review templates

state, memory, skill-candidate, loop-state, checker-context, evidence-ledger, approval-ledger, and export-manifest templates

PyYAML development dependency for parsing YAML validation templates

public_package_policy: publish reusable instructions, templates, checklists, and docs
keep secrets, private data, temporary work artifacts, and local-only files out of the package
known_limits: This repository provides a universal creation system and templates.
Target platform adapters must be audited for the target runtime before public production claims.
Birth artifacts are templates until a real first-run install fills them with bounded observations.
Subagent delegation requires explicit user, workflow, or platform-policy authorization plus target-specific permission and sandbox enforcement.
Templates are not evidence until a real validated run fills them with bounded observations.

Automated harness search, active failure discovery, dynamic memory/playbook optimization, self-critique, self-preference, automatic ablation, and context-sufficiency gating remain experiments until local matched-budget holdout evidence supports them.
The package does not authorize unattended production self-modification, unsandboxed generated tools, or LLM-only safety certification.
